name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4a for the Monster group.
formula: G.f. is a period 1 Fourier series which satisfies f(-1 / (8 t)) = - f(t) where q = exp(2 Pi i t). - _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011
Expansion of q^(1/2) * ((eta(q) / eta(q^2))^12 - 64*(eta(q^2) / eta(q))^12) in powers of q. - _G. A. Edgar_, Mar 10 2017
program: (PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<0, 0, A = x * O(x^n); A = (eta(x + A) / eta(x^2 + A))^12; polcoeff( A - 64 * x / A, n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011 */
(PARI) N=66; q='q+O('q^N); t=(eta(q)/eta(q^2))^12; Vec(t - 64*q/t) \\ _Joerg Arndt_, Mar 11 2017
